meaning: Individual letters Alif-Lam-Ra (opening of سورة الحجر)
that/those (pointing to something far away) (referring to ءَايٰتُ - verses)
if (introducing an impossible or unlikely wish)
leave them! (command to let them be, connected to يَأْكُلُوا۟)
let them eat (after ذَرْهُمْ - leave them)
except (in this ayah: showing that every town has its set time)
and for it/her (connected to كِتَابٌ - a book)
any community (possessed by something in أَجَلَهَا)
O you! (calling out to get attention)
was sent down repeatedly (referring to الذِّكْرُ - the reminder)
upon him (referring to ٱلذِّكْرُ - the reminder/message)
indeed you (being addressed by وَقَالُوا - and they said)
surely one whose mind is hidden/covered (indefinite)
if (introduces condition for كُنتَ - you were)
the angels (object of نُنَزِّلُ - we send down)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from what was mentioned before نُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ)
with the truth (describes how نُنَزِّلُ/we send down is done)
in that case/therefore (connects to مَا كَانُوٓا۟)
those who are given time (predicate of كانوا)
we (subject of نَزَّلْنَا - we sent down)
and indeed we (the subject of لَحٰفِظُونَ - guardians)
and certainly/verily (emphasizes the action أَرْسَلْنَا that follows)
we sent (followed by مِن قَبْلِكَ - before you)
like that, in this way (connected to نَسْلُكُهُۥ)
they believe/trust (لَا - they do not believe in it)
with it (referring to belief in لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ)
and indeed/certainly (connects to لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ - they do not believe)
the established way/practice (subject of خَلَتْ - has passed)
and even if (introducing a hypothetical scenario in فَتَحْنَا)
upon them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
a door (object of فَتَحْنَا - we opened)
so they continued doing something (subject of يَعْرُجُونَ)
in it (referring to the gate/باب mentioned earlier)
surely they would say (in response to إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصٰرُنَا)
it (fem) was blocked/covered intensely (referring to أَبْصٰرُنَا - our eyes)
rather (contradicting what was said before about أَبْصٰرُنَا being bewitched)
for the people who look carefully
a rebellious one (being described by رَّجِيمٍ)
and then he made him follow (referring to the one who tried to steal a hearing mentioned in the previous ayah)
we stretched it (referring to الأرض/the Earth)
in it (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)
and we made (something) grow (connected to مَدَدْنٰهَا)
and we made/placed (connected to previous statement)
for you all (receivers of مَعٰيِشَ/means of living)
in it (feminine, referring to the earth/places mentioned)
for him/it (referring to those who you do not provide for)
except (excluding خَزَآئِنُهُۥ from the previous statement)
by a measure (describing how نُنَزِّلُهُ 'We send it down' happens)
the winds (object of أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)
so we sent down (water from the sky)
water (as the object being sent down)
so we made you all drink it
for him/it (referring to the water mentioned in فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً)
and indeed we (subject of نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ)
indeed/verily we (subject of نُحْىِۦ - we give life)
and we cause to die (connected to نُحْىِۦ - we give life)
And surely indeed (connects to عَلِمْنَا - We know)
those who go/come forward (object of عَلِمْنَا - we knew)
those who stay behind (object of عَلِمْنَا - we know)
he gathers/will gather them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
dry clay that makes a sound when tapped (owned, after مِن)
and the jinn (object of خَلَقْنٰهُ/we created)
from (showing what the jinn were created from)
from (shows where something comes from, in this case the جَآنَّ was created from نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ)
of the intensely hot/poisonous wind (describing نَّارِ/fire)
he said (subject of لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ - to the angels)
your Lord (who said to the angels)
to/for the angels (who Allah speaks to)
of a clay that rings (when struck)
something that was shaped/made smooth (describing حَمَإٍ - black mud)
I fashioned him/it completely (refers to آدَمَ/Adam mentioned earlier)
and I blew/breathed (into him, after سَوَّيْتُهُ - I fashioned him)
to/for him (connected to فَقَعُوا۟ - fall down)
so/then he bowed down in worship
all together (describing the angels in فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ)
Satan (as the subject of أَبَىٰٓ - he refused)
O Iblis! (being addressed by Allah in قَالَ - He said)
that not (introduces why إِبْلِيسُ is being questioned)
that I prostrate (to لِبَشَرٍ/to a human)
to/for a human being (indefinite, object of لِأَسْجُدَ)
of dry clay that makes a ringing sound when struck (possessed by مِن)
of black mud (describing what صَلْصٰلٍ was made from)
of altered black mud that has been perfectly shaped/molded (describing حَمَإٍ)
for indeed you (addressing Iblis after being told to leave)
an outcast, one who is driven away (description of إِنَّكَ - indeed you are)
and indeed (emphasizes عَلَيْكَ ٱللَّعْنَةَ - the curse is upon you)
upon you (object of curse in this ayah)
so give me time! (as a command to Allah)
the ones who are given time (plural, object of مِنَ)
of the appointed time (possessed by يَوْمِ - day)
of the known/determined (time of يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ)
you led me astray (said by Iblis to Allah)
I will most certainly decorate/make beautiful (said by Iblis to Allah)
for them, to them (object of لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ - I will surely beautify)
And I will surely lead them astray
all together (as the object being acted upon by لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ - I will surely mislead them)
from among them (referring to عِبَادَكَ - Your servants)
for you (when speaking to one male)
and indeed/certainly (emphasizes what follows about جَهَنَّمَ)
hell (as the destination of أَجْمَعِينَ - all of them)
a door (part of سَبْعَةُ أَبْوٰبٍ - seven doors)
from them (connected to جُزْءٌ - a portion)
a part (that is divided/assigned in مَّقْسُومٌ)
the God-fearing ones (who are إِنَّ in gardens and springs)
gardens (in جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ - gardens and springs)
with peace (describing how to enter in ٱدْخُلُوهَا)
and we removed completely (what is in their hearts)
any hatred (that is in صُدُورِهِم their hearts)
facing each other (plural, describing the brothers on thrones)
he touches/affects them (referring to the people of Paradise mentioned earlier)
and not (negates هُم مِّنْهَا بِمُخْرَجِينَ - they from it being removed)
they (as the subject of يَمَسُّ - touches)
to be expelled/removed from (connected to هُم and مِنْهَا)
that I/indeed I (introducing Allah's statement أَنَا ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ)
The Intensely Merciful One (one of Allah's names, subject of the sentence)
he/it (refers to عَذَابِى 'My punishment' from previous word)
and tell them! (as a command) (about ضَيْفِ إِبْرٰهِيمَ)
Abraham (object of عَن ضَيْفِ - about the guests of)
they entered (subject of قَالُوا - they said)
upon him (entered عَلَيْهِ - they entered upon him)
and/so they said (after دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ - they entered upon him)
peace (as a greeting to عَلَيْهِ - to him)
from you all (object of وَجِلُونَ - afraid)
those who are afraid (subject of قَالَ - he said)
with a boy/youth (object of نُبَشِّرُكَ - we give you glad tidings of)
one who is deeply knowledgeable (describing غُلٰمٍ - a boy/son)
he said (asking about the good news they brought)
did you all give good news to me? (asking in disbelief in response to قَالَ)
that (connects 'you gave me good news' with 'old age has touched me')
the old age (specific old age being discussed)
so with what (are you giving good news?)
you (all) give much good news (addressing Ibrahim in the ayah)
we gave you good news (to Ibrahim)
with the truth (they gave good news to you)
so not (connected to بَشَّرْنٰكَ - we gave you good news)
the ones who lose hope completely (after مِنَ)
those who go astray (in accusative case)
so what (asking about خَطْبُكُمْ - your matter)
the messengers (those being addressed in this ayah)
we were sent (to قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ - a criminal people)
Lot's (family of Lot in آلَ لُوطٍ)
all together (object of لَمُنَجُّوهُمْ - we will save them)
except (introduces an exception to ٱمْرَأَتَهُۥ/his wife)
indeed she/it (referring to امْرَأَتَهُ - his wife)
the ones who stay behind (after لَمِنَ)
then when (introducing what happened when messengers came to Lot)
completely unknown ones (referring to angels appearing as strangers)
but rather (correcting the previous statement قَالُوا۟)
with what (they were doubting in يَمْتَرُونَ)
in it (referring to what they doubted in مَا كَانُوا۟ يَمْتَرُونَ)
and we came/brought to you (with بِٱلْحَقِّ)
and indeed we (connected to لَصٰدِقُونَ - truly truthful)
with a piece (of الَّيْلِ - the night)
of the night (part of قِطْعٍ مِّنَ)
and follow intensely! (command to one person)
he turns himself around (in negative command with لا)
from you all (addressing the family of لوط)
to him (connected to وَقَضَيْنَآ - and We decreed)
the matter/affair (object of قَضَيْنَا - We decreed)
they seek good news for themselves (referring to the people of the city)
so/then don't (connected to قَالَ - he said)
and protect yourselves! (command to group, paused form)
and did not? (questioning the people who said قَالُوٓا۟)
these ones (subject of قَالَ - he said)
indeed they (who are in سَكْرَتِهِمْ/their intoxication)
their state of intoxication/confusion (while they wander blindly in يَعْمَهُونَ)
then she seized them (subject of مُشْرِقِينَ)
its high part (acted on by جَعَلْنَا/we made)
and we caused to rain down (on عَلَيْهِمْ them)
upon them (referring to the people being punished)
stones (as the object being rained down)
from/of (describing what the stones حِجَارَةً are made of)
surely signs (for لِّلْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ - for those who read the signs)
for the ones who look carefully for signs
and indeed it/she (referring to the path/road mentioned after)
surely/indeed on a path (connected to مُّقِيمٍ - established)
for the believers (in this ayah: a sign for the believers)
and if (connects this condition about the people of Aykah to previous statements)
of the thicket (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ - companions)
and so We took revenge (from مِنْهُمْ - from them)
from them (referring to the people of Aykah mentioned earlier)
And indeed certainly (connects to previous statement)
he strongly denied/rejected (أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْحِجْرِ denied ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ)
the rocky valley (of the people of Thamud)
and so they were (responding to آتَيْنَاهُمْ - We gave them)
away from them (referring to آيٰتِنَا - Our signs)
those who turn away (predicate of كَانُوا)
they carve/are carving (from the mountains houses)
houses (as objects being carved from mountains)
then she/it seized them (subject of الصَّيْحَةُ)
those who enter morning time (describes when الصَّيْحَةُ seized them)
they earn/are earning (referring to what they were doing in كَانُوا)
and what/not (connects to خَلَقْنَا - we created)
and the earth (as object of خَلَقْنَا - we created)
and not (negating خَلَقْنَا - we did not create)
with the truth (describing how خَلَقْنَا/We created was done)
The All-Knowing (attribute of Allah mentioned after هُوَ)
the oft-repeated verses (referring to the seven verses of Surah Al-Fatiha)
and the Quran (object being given along with سَبْعًا)
your two eyes (object of لَا تَمُدَّنَّ - do not extend)
that which (connects to مَتَّعْنَا - we gave enjoyment)
and say! (followed by إِنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلنَّذِيرُ ٱلْمُبِينُ - Indeed, I am the clear warner)
the ones who divide for themselves
those who (referring to the people who divided the Quran into parts)
The Quran (as the object of جَعَلُوا - they made)
all of them together (object of لَنَسْـَٔلَنَّهُمْ - we will surely question them)
so declare openly! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to proclaim the message)
with what (that is commanded in تُؤْمَرُ)
indeed we (subject of كَفَيْنٰكَ - we sufficed you)
we were sufficient for you (object of إِنَّا)
the mockers (object of كَفَيْنٰكَ - We protected you from)
they make/set/place (referring to those who in ٱلَّذِينَ)
a god (object of يَجْعَلُونَ - they take/make)
then will/then in the future (connects to يَعْلَمُونَ - they will know)
indeed you (object of نَعْلَمُ - we know)
your chest (subject of يَضِيقُ - becomes tight)
your Lord (possessed by حَمْدِ in بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ)
and be! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
until (connects to يَأْتِيَكَ - comes to you)
the absolute certainty (subject of يَأْتِيَكَ - comes to you)
